headline: Honeywell Sees Strong M&A Opportunities in Industrial Automation Business
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is included among the 10 Best S&P 500 Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 11, Reuters reported that Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is targeting acquisitions valued between $2 billion and $4 billion and sees significant opportunities for deals within its industrial automation business. “There is a ton of opportunity […]
